import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [userName, setUserName] = useState(''); const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); const [showAnimation, setShowAnimation] = useState(false); // Функція для оновлення класів sidebar const updateSidebarClasses = (isOpen) => { if (isOpen) { document.body.classList.add('sidebar-open'); document.documentElement.classList.add('sidebar-open'); } else { document.body.classList.remove('sidebar-open'); document.documentElement.classList.remove('sidebar-open'); } }; useEffect(() => { // Перевірка чи користувач увійшов в систему const user_id = localStorage.getItem('user_id'); if (!user_id) { navigate('/'); return; } // Завантаження даних користувача const fetchUserData = async () => { try { const response = await fetch(`http://localhost:5000/api/user-data/${user_id}`); if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch user data'); const data = await response.json(); if (data.name) setUserName(data.name); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching user data:', error); } }; fetchUserData(); // Активація анімації з невеликою затримкою після монтування setTimeout(() => setShowAnimation(true), 100); // Очищення при розмонтуванні компонента return () => updateSidebarClasses(false); }, [navigate]); // Застосовуємо класи при зміні стану sidebar useEffect(() => { updateSidebarClasses(isSidebarOpen); }, [isSidebarOpen]); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('user_id'); localStorage.removeItem('viewing_as_user_id'); localStorage.removeItem('selected_user_id'); navigate('/'); }; const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(!isSidebarOpen); }; const closeSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(false); }; return (
{/* Top Bar */}

Asthma Monitoring System

Welcome, {userName}!

{/* Dashboard Content */}
{/* App Information Section */}

About Asthma Monitoring App

Purpose

The Asthma Monitoring App is designed to help individuals with asthma track their condition, predict potential exacerbations, and maintain better control over their respiratory health. By combining personal health data with advanced machine learning algorithms, we provide timely insights and recommendations to improve quality of life.

Key Features

  • Health Data Recording - Track lung function metrics (FEV1, FVC, PEF), symptoms, and vital signs in one place
  • Exacerbation Risk Prediction - Get personalized risk assessments based on your health data using neural network technology
  • Medication Management - Monitor your medication intake and adherence
  • Trend Analysis - Visualize your health progress through interactive graphs
  • Personalized Recommendations - Receive tailored advice based on your specific condition and risk level

How to Use

  1. Recording Indicators - Regularly input your health measurements and symptoms
  2. Check Your Risk - Visit the Exacerbation Forecast page to get a personalized risk assessment
  3. Track Your Progress - Use the Graphs of Changes to monitor improvements over time
  4. Manage Medications - Log and track your prescribed medications in the Medication Diary
  5. Stay Consistent - For best results, record your data at regular intervals

Technology

Our app uses an advanced neural network to predict asthma exacerbation risk with high accuracy. The model processes multiple respiratory parameters including FEV1, FVC, PEF, respiratory rate, along with symptom severity scores (cough, breathlessness, wheezing). Trained on extensive clinical data, our neural network identifies subtle patterns that precede exacerbations, providing early warnings 3-5 days before clinical symptoms worsen. The system achieves 83% sensitivity in detecting high-risk states and automatically generates personalized recommendations based on your specific health indicators and medical history.

{/* Quick Access Section */}

); } export default Dashboard;
